<workspaceFolder path="c:\\Users\\aleph\\OASIS\\aleph-scriptorium">
<task id="APB: Start Full Stack">
{
	"label": "APB: Start Full Stack",
	"dependsOn": [
		"APB: Start [MCP Launcher]",
		"APB: Start [Backend]",
		"APB: Start [Frontend]",
		"NOV: Start [Server]"
	],
	"dependsOrder": "sequence",
	"group": {
		"kind": "build",
		"isDefault": true
	},
	"detail": "Arranca MCP Launcher (3050) → Backend (8000) → Frontend (5001)"
}
</task>
<task id="shell: APB: Start [MCP Launcher]">
{
	"label": "APB: Start [MCP Launcher]",
	"type": "shell",
	"command": "npm",
	"args": [
		"run",
		"start:launcher"
	],
	"options": {
		"cwd": "${workspaceFolder}/MCPGallery/mcp-mesh-sdk",
		"env": {
			"PATH": "${env:PATH};C:\\Program Files\\swipl\\bin"
		}
	},
	"isBackground": true,
	"detail": "MCP Launcher (3050) + Prolog Server (3006)"
}
</task>

{
	"label": "APB: Start [Backend]",

{
	"label": "APB: Check Prerequisites",
	"type": "shell",
	"command": "bash",
	"args": [
		"-c",
		"bash ./scripts/apb-health-check.sh 2>&1 | head -30"
	],
	"options": {
		"cwd": "${workspaceFolder}"
	},
	"detail": "Solo verifica prerequisitos (swipl en PATH) - rápido"
}
</task>
<task id="shell: APB: Test Query">
{
	"label": "APB: Test Query",
	"type": "shell",
	"command": "curl",
	"args": [
		"-s",
		"-X",
		"POST",
		"http://localhost:8000/api/run-rule",
		"-H",
		"Content-Type: application/json",
		"-d",
		"{\"rule\":\"member(X, [1,2,3])\"}"
	],
	"detail": "Ejecuta query Prolog de prueba via Backend"
}
</task>

{

<task id="shell: APB: Stop All">
{
	"label": "APB: Stop All",
	"type": "shell",
	"command": "cmd",
	"args": [
		"/c",
		"taskkill /F /IM node.exe /FI \"WINDOWTITLE eq APB*\" 2>nul & echo Services stopped"
	],
	"detail": "Detiene todos los procesos del stack APB"
}
</task>
<task id="shell: APB: Build Chain">
{
	"label": "APB: Build Chain",
	"type": "shell",
	"command": "bash",
	"args": [
		"-c",
		"echo '🔨 Building MCP Core SDK...' && cd ${workspaceFolder}/MCPGallery/mcp-core-sdk && npm run build && echo '🔨 Building MCP Mesh SDK...' && cd ../mcp-mesh-sdk && npm run build && echo '🔨 Building Backend...' && cd ../../PrologEditor/backend && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo '(no build script)' && echo '🔨 Building Frontend...' && cd ../frontend && npm run build && echo '✅ Build chain complete'"
	],
	"group": "build",
	"detail": "Build completo: core-sdk → mesh-sdk → backend → frontend"
}
</task>

</workspaceFolder>
